name: Standard Technical Interview Evaluation Rubric

criteria.name: Technical Skills
criteria.description: Depth of role-relevant technical knowledge and correctness of solutions to coding/technical questions.

score_guide.1-2: Cannot solve basic problems for the role; major gaps in fundamentals.
score_guide.3: Solves expected problems with some guidance; solid grasp of fundamentals.
score_guide.4-5: Solves problems independently and efficiently; demonstrates deeper understanding beyond the question asked.

criteria.name: Problem Solving
criteria.description: Approach to breaking down unfamiliar problems, debugging, and reasoning under ambiguity.

score_guide.1-2: Gets stuck and cannot make progress without heavy hints.
score_guide.3: Reaches a working approach with some prompting; reasonable debugging instincts.
score_guide.4-5: Structures the problem clearly, considers edge cases and tradeoffs unprompted.

criteria.name: Communication
criteria.description: Clarity of explanation, ability to articulate reasoning, and responsiveness to questions/feedback.

score_guide.1-2: Difficult to follow; cannot explain own reasoning.
score_guide.3: Explains reasoning clearly when asked; communicates adequately.
score_guide.4-5: Proactively explains tradeoffs and reasoning; communicates concisely and precisely.

criteria.name: Cultural Fit
criteria.description: Alignment with collaborative work style, coachability, and enthusiasm for the role.

score_guide.1-2: Dismissive of feedback or shows little engagement with the role.
score_guide.3: Receptive to feedback; reasonable engagement and motivation.
score_guide.4-5: Highly coachable, curious, and clearly motivated by the specific role/company.

content: Standard technical interview evaluation rubric with four weighted criteria: Technical Skills (40%) assessing depth of role-relevant knowledge and correctness of solutions, Problem Solving (30%) assessing approach to unfamiliar problems and debugging under ambiguity, Communication (20%) assessing clarity of explanation and responsiveness, and Cultural Fit (10%) assessing collaborative style and coachability. Each criterion is scored on a 1-5 scale where 1 is poor, 3 meets expectations, and 5 is outstanding. The final weighted score is computed as (technical*0.40 + problem_solving*0.30 + communication*0.20 + cultural_fit*0.10).
